I tried to do is as accurate as humanly possible, so I'm really sorry if there are any bugs or mistakes. I tried so had to give it details and make it as accurate as I could. Hope you'll enjoy it.
Happy Valentine's day everyone! No matter if you enjoy this day with your partner, friends, family, or alone, enjoy this day 'cause you deserve all the love in the world. Smile and spread joy around you! Maybe you can be the reason why someone smiles today! :D
